'''Loan-chat''' was a manufacturing company that produced [[Ejector seat/Legends|ejector seats]] for [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Their products, such as the [["Slingshot" ejection seat]], were used in [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]]/[[Sublight Products Corporation|Subpro]] [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]].<ref name="SWS" />
